title: LangGraph Overview
snippet: LangGraph is used to build stateful agent workflows with nodes, edges, transitions, and branching logic.

title: Redis Context Memory
snippet: Redis can persist short-term conversation context, message history, and cache entries for repeated chat prompts.

title: Elasticsearch Search Basics
snippet: Elasticsearch supports keyword and full-text search across indexed JSON documents using analyzers and scoring.

title: Langfuse Tracing
snippet: Langfuse records traces for prompts, responses, metadata, sessions, and model behavior in LLM applications.

title: Ollama Local Models
snippet: Ollama lets developers run open models locally through an HTTP API, making offline or self-hosted inference easy.

title: Hugging Face Inference API
snippet: The Hugging Face Inference API provides hosted model access over HTTPS for text generation and other tasks.

title: Parallel Agent Pattern
snippet: Parallel agents can run search and summarization at the same time before merging their outputs into one answer.

title: Supervisor Routing
snippet: A supervisor agent can inspect the user query and choose whether summary, search, or parallel execution is best.

title: Vector Search Concepts
snippet: Vector search retrieves semantically similar content by comparing embeddings rather than exact keywords only.

title: Chat UI Integration
snippet: A frontend chat application usually sends a message payload to the backend and renders route, answer, and tool outputs.
